top_signals.title: Kuwait closes airspace, Israel warns of launches from Lebanon after U.S strikes in Iran
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Thai Hospitality Group Minor International Said to Mull Singapore IPO Instead of HK
top_signals.summary: Thailand’s Minor International Pcl is considering listing its restaurant business in Singapore instead of Hong Kong as it sees greater interest from potential investors in the city-state, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Barr, Efficient and Effective Central Banking: Beyond the Balance Sheet
top_signals.summary: Speech At the Money Marketeers of New York University, New York, New York
